The '''''Starknife''''' was a modified [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[D9 Runner light freighter]] owned by the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Kalend Thora]]. She received the ''Starknife'' after the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] original owner, a fellow member of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], was ambushed and killed by an unknown party.<ref name="sisar" />
